reviews.comment:
Lugar limpio pero solo una persona atendiendo siendo socio del aca me tuve que ir por que no me atendieron después de 30 min de espera...

(Translated by Google)
The place was clean, but there was only one person working. Even though I'm a member of the ACA (Association of Members of the Association of Auxiliary Companies), I had to leave because I wasn't served after a 30-minute wait.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNweU9PRlF3EAE
